description: The black group on the left occured in a yesterday played 7x7 game. What can White do inside it to avoid defeat?!
sgf:

RU[Japanese]SZ[7]KM[0.50]
AW[ea][eb][gb][dc][fc][bd][cd][dd][ed][fd][gd][de][df][dg][eg]AB[ca][da][db][bc][cc][ad][be][ce][ee][fe][ge][cf][ef][gf][cg][fg]C[No komi, no prisoners -White to play and win!]PL[W]
